/usr/bin/ar qc libcomal-parser.a "CMakeFiles/comal-parser.dir/parser.tab.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-parser.dir/lex.yy.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-parser.dir/src/lexer_support.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-parser.dir/src/parser_support.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-parser.dir/src/parser_api.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-parser.dir/src/parser_deps.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/comal-parser.dir/src/ast_compat.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libcomal-parser.a
